name: council
description: Multi-agent council for Claude Code: six-eyes review (Claude + Codex + Grok, independent then peer critique) with consensus/verification and a findings ledger. Read-only `review` (never writes) is separate from the one write verb `fix` — the autonomous, test-gated review→fix→re-review loop on an isolated branch — plus whole-project audit, plan/build, solve, benchmarking, and a live dashboard.
